# sevalla_static_site (Data Source)

Use this data source to retrieve information about a Sevalla static site.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sevalla_static_site" "example" {
  id = "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
}

output "site_hostname" {
  value = data.sevalla_static_site.example.hostname
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the static site.

### Read-Only

- `auto_deploy` (Boolean) Whether auto deploy is enabled.
- `build_command` (String) The build command.
- `company_id` (String) The company ID that owns the static site.
- `created_at` (String) When the static site was created.
- `default_branch` (String) The default branch to deploy from.
- `display_name` (String) The display name of the static site.
- `error_file` (String) The error file for the static site.
- `git_type` (String) The Git provider type.
- `hostname` (String) The hostname of the static site.
- `index_file` (String) The index file for the static site.
- `install_command` (String) The install command.
- `is_preview_enabled` (Boolean) Whether preview deployments are enabled.
- `name` (String) The system-generated name of the static site.
- `node_version` (String) The Node.js version used for building.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID associated with this static site.
- `published_directory` (String) The directory where built static files are published.
- `repo_url` (String) The repository URL for the static site source.
- `root_directory` (String) The root directory within the repository.
- `source` (String) The source type of the static site.
- `status` (String) The current status of the static site.
- `updated_at` (String) When the static site was last updated.
